title: CityMod
description:
Create your own cities where one block is one building! There are roads, trees and various buildings at your disposal. 

The mod is compatible with Water Physics Overhaul by Sasai_Kudasai_BM!
body:
Create your own cities where one block is one building! There are roads, trees and various buildings at your disposal.

The mod is compatible with **Water Physics Overhaul** from **Sushi_Kudasai_BM**!

Also check out the map of the city that was built thanks to this mod: "CityMap" (under development).

![Add Specular Maps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c6806a4aef97f26e687897bc448c7df5e70c933.png)**
